message:
fix(encoding): reject NaN and Infinity repair_overhead in EncodingPipeline

repair_overhead validated only `< 1.0` which passes NaN (comparison is
false) and Infinity (>= 1.0). NaN produces 0 repair symbols silently;
Infinity causes compute_repair_count to return usize::MAX, leading to
near-infinite iteration or OOM. Add is_finite() guard and regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
